notes: Surface areas and volumes of cuboids, cylinders, cones, spheres, hemispheres. Multi-shape chapter — students mix up formulas. 4 items, 3 chunks each.

items.subject: math
items.concept: CSA = 2 pi r h, TSA = 2 pi r (r + h)

items.subject: math
items.concept: slant height l = sqrt(r^2 + h^2), CSA = pi r l

items.subject: math
items.concept: 4 pi r^2 surface, (4/3) pi r^3 volume
